owned_files.notes: 9-column schema (id, name, category, subcategory, base_material, weight_kg, stack_size, durability, description). 12 categories represented: clothing, tool, weapon, furniture, food, material, machine, vehicle, medical, electronics, container, decoration. Volumetric physics data attached. ~70% of way to 500-item milestone.

10-column schema (id, name, category, inputs, outputs, craft_time_sec, station_required, skill_required, skill_level, description). 9 categories: smelting, refining, crafting, construction, textile, cooking, electronics, assembly, chemistry. Already exceeds 200-recipe milestone by 53%.

gaps: items.csv at 353/500 — needs ~150 more items to hit milestone
Subcategory coverage uneven; some categories may be sparse
No advanced/late-game items audit performed (electronics, vehicles depth unclear)
No cross-validation that every recipe input/output id exists in items.csv
summary: Recipes have already passed the 200 milestone (307), but items remain at 353/500. Scope is genuinely active until ~150 more items land; recipe expansion can ride alongside as items grow.
